title: ‘He’s our guy. We love him’: Timberwolves devasted by Donte DiVincenzo’s season-ending injury
description: His voice cracked. He became choked up. Timberwolves coach Chris Finch struggled to put into words how he felt about Donte DiVincenzo’s season-ending injury in Game 4 against Denver on Saturday. DiVincenzo attempted to chase down the rebound off his own missed shot fewer than two minutes into the game. But as he attempted to get going, he looked back at where he started his movement in seeming ...

title: Seattle’s single in the ninth ends home run battle
description: ST. LOUIS -- Julio Rodriguez, Will Wilson and Cole Young each homered, and Leo Rivas hit a two-run single in the ninth to help the Seattle Mariners beat the St. Louis Cardinals 11-9 on Saturday.

title: Keir Starmer's message to Trump after shots fired as King Charles's US visit update given
description: Donald Trump and Melania Trump were attending the White House Correspondents' Dinner when the incident unfolded.

title: 8th Pay Commission: Group C Level 1 employee lost Rs 25,000 during COVID-19 DA freeze
description: A detailed breakdown now circulating among government employee groups shows exactly what that freeze cost a single Group C, Level 1 employee over those eighteen months. The number is Rs 25,224. For one person, at the lowest rungs of central government employment. And that figure does not include what pensioners lost, or what employees at higher pay levels absorbed.

title: Did Donald Trump stage-manage attack on himself? White House Spokesperson's 'prediction' goes viral, comes under scanner
description: Leavitt was speaking to Fox News. She told viewers President Trump would "bring the heat" and that there would be "shots fired".

title: Raghu Rai Passes Away At 83: A Life That Shaped Indian Photojournalism
description: Raghu Rai, one of India’s most iconic photographers, passes away at 83. A look at his legacy, from the Bhopal tragedy to portraits that defined a nation.

title: JV: Philippines still facing urgent housing crisis, warns of worsening backlog
description: Senator JV Ejercito urges urgent action on the Philippines’ housing crisis, citing a 2.2M-unit backlog and millions of informal settlers, while warning that policy changes may delay housing delivery.

title: IPL 2026: Arshdeep Singh Walks Hand-In-Hand With Rumoured Girlfriend Samreen Kaur; Video Sparks Buzz Among Fans
description: A viral video of Arshdeep Singh walking hand-in-hand with rumoured girlfriend Samreen Kaur has grabbed attention during IPL 2026. The clip fueled ongoing dating speculation, with fans noting this isn’t their first public appearance together, further intensifying buzz around the cricketer’s personal life.
